config.co_agents.enabled_desc: Allow the agent to spawn parallel sub-agents for complex tasks.
config.co_agents.disabled_desc: Enable to let the agent delegate tasks to parallel sub-agents and specialist co-agents.
config.co_agents.max_concurrent_desc: Maximum number of co-agents running at the same time.
config.co_agents.llm_desc: Select a provider for co-agents. Falls back to the main LLM if not set.
config.co_agents.specialists_desc: Specialist co-agents have role-specific prompts, tool restrictions, and optional dedicated LLM providers. Each specialist can be enabled independently.
config.co_agents.spec_researcher_desc: Web search, cross-referencing, and fact gathering. No shell or code execution.
config.co_agents.spec_coder_desc: Shell, Python, filesystem, and Git operations. No image generation.
config.co_agents.spec_designer_desc: Image generation and creative assets. No shell or code execution.
config.co_agents.spec_security_desc: Security audits, OWASP/CIS/NIST checks. Read-only filesystem access.
config.co_agents.spec_writer_desc: Documentation, content, reports. Memory and filesystem access, no code execution.
